chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Cr. B. A. No. 1176 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge For hearing of bail application 19.08.2025 Mr. Muhammad Nadeem Khan, advocate for applicant Mr. Muhammad Mohsin Mangi, APG ---------- Counsel for the applicant places a copy of Order dated 26.05.2025 passed by learned trial Court in Criminal Case No.4783/2024, which is taken on record, and submits that the matter has been compromised between the parties, therefore, he wishes to withdraw this bail application. Accordingly, this bail application is dismissed as withdrawn. J U D G E Ashraf
